job_description:
Senior SQL Database Designer & Developer (PostgreSQL) - 6+ Years

Role Overview We are seeking a highly skilled Senior SQL Database Designer & Developer with specialized, expert-level proficiency in PostgreSQL. In this role, you will lead the architectural design, schema optimization, and long-term scalability of our data systems driving enterprise-level applications. You will bridge the gap between complex business requirements and high-performance database execution. This role requires an expert who can write procedural code and implement advanced database designs to handle massive data volumes securely.

Key Responsibilities - Database Architecture: Architect clean, scalable PostgreSQL relational schemas, tables, and views. - Procedural Development: Write and maintain advanced PL/pgSQL stored procedures, functions, and complex triggers. - Performance Tuning: Analyze EXPLAIN execution plans to eliminate query bottlenecks and optimize memory footprints. - Data Modeling: Formulate logical and physical data structures utilizing normalization and dimensional modeling techniques. - Optimization Strategies: Implement custom table partitioning, sharding architectures, and strategic indexing. - Cross-Team Collaboration: Work closely with backend application developers to build efficient APIs and JSONB query strategies. - Data Governance: Enforce strict data integrity constraints, access controls, and row-level security protocols. - Lifecycle Management: Build database migration workflows, schema versioning scripts, and support ongoing CI/CD deployments.

Required Skills & Qualifications - Experience: 6 to 10 years of professional database engineering experience, with 4+ years strictly focused on PostgreSQL. - Language Mastery: Deep expertise in ANSI SQL and advanced, native PostgreSQL dialect patterns. - Feature Expertise: Proven usage of PostgreSQL-specific features like JSONB, window functions, arrays, and custom types. - Internals Knowledge: Solid understanding of engine internals including MVCC, VACUUM processes, and Write-Ahead Logging (WAL). - Automation Mastery: Good automation skills using scripting languages like Python or Bash. - Education: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or equivalent engineering disciplines.

Preferred / Good-to-Have Skills - Cloud Infrastructure: Hands-on experience deploying managed PostgreSQL systems like AWS RDS, Azure Database, or GCP Cloud SQL. - Migration Experience: Background in porting enterprise workloads from Oracle (PL/SQL) or SQL Server to PostgreSQL. - Monitoring Tools: Experience diagnosing health through pg_stat_statements, Prometheus, Grafana, or pgAdmin. - Vector Extensions: Exposure to pgvector for handling AI/ML vector embeddings is a strong asset. - Hybrid Systems: Basic knowledge of NoSQL systems such as Redis, MongoDB, or Cassandra.

Contact: If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at r.reshma@thinkpalm.com.
summary: Senior SQL Database Designer & Developer (PostgreSQL) with 6+ years of experience required. Expertise in PostgreSQL architecture, performance tuning, and advanced data modeling for enterprise applications.
